title: You'll Never Walk Alone
lyrics:
When you walk through a storm, hold your head up high,
And don't be afraid of the dark.
At the end of a storm, there's a golden sky,
And the sweet silver song of a lark.
Walk on through the wind, walk on through the rain,
Though your dreams be tossed and blown.
Walk on, walk on, with hope in your heart,
And you'll never walk alone.
description: Liverpool's anthem, sung by the Kop before kickoff. Adapted from Rodgers and Hammerstein's Carousel.

title: Fields of Anfield Road
lyrics:
Outside the Safeway supermarket, I heard a Kopite moan,
He said we can't buy players when we're trying to build a home,
But I said we play the Liverpool way, we press and never tire,
And when the Reds go marching in, we set the world on fire.
description: Liverpool fan song sung to the tune of Fields of Athenry, about life around Anfield.

title: Poor Scouser Tommy
lyrics:
Let me tell you the story of a poor boy,
Who left his home in the Isle of Dogs,
To join a good ship and sail the world wide,
But he never returned to the Isle of Dogs.
description: Traditional Liverpool folk song about a sailor from the Isle of Dogs; often sung on away trips.

title: Walk On
lyrics:
Walk on, walk on, with hope in your heart,
And you'll never walk alone.
description: Refrain from You'll Never Walk Alone; sung throughout matches after the full anthem.

title: In My Liverpool Home
lyrics:
In my Liverpool home, in my Liverpool home,
We speak with an accent exceedingly rare,
We meet under a statue exceedingly bare,
If you want a cathedral, we've got one to spare,
In my Liverpool home.
description: Comic Liverpool folk song celebrating the city's character.

title: Liverpool Lou
lyrics:
Oh, Liverpool Lou, lovely Liverpool Lou,
Why don't you behave, love, like the others do?
description: Traditional Merseyside folk song associated with Liverpool supporters.

title: The Leaving of Liverpool
lyrics:
Farewell to Prince's Landing Pier,
Where many a pleasant hour I spent,
I'm bound off for California,
A place I know right well.
description: Sea shanty and folk standard sung by Liverpool travelling support.

title: We All Follow Liverpool
lyrics:
We all follow Liverpool,
Over land and sea and Leicester,
We all follow Liverpool,
On to victory.
description: Core Liverpool call-and-response chant declaring support home and away.

title: Oh Liverpool We Love You
lyrics:
Oh Liverpool, we love you,
We do, oh Liverpool we love you, we do,
Oh Liverpool we love you, we do,
And we love the Kop as well.
description: Simple terrace song affirming support for the club and the Kop.

title: The Liver Bird Upon My Chest
lyrics:
I've got a Liver Bird upon my chest,
One nothing else will do,
I've got a Liver Bird upon my chest,
'Cause I'm a Liverpudlian through and through.
description: Terrace song about wearing the Liver Bird crest with pride.

title: This Is Anfield
lyrics:
This is Anfield,
This is Anfield,
No one wants to be here.
description: Chant referencing the famous This Is Anfield sign in the players' tunnel.

title: Allez Allez Allez
lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Liverpool, super Liverpool,
Allez, allez, allez.
description: Adapted terrace chant popularised during Liverpool's 2018 Champions League run.

title: Allez Les Rouges
lyrics:
Allez les Rouges, allez les Rouges,
Allez les Rouges.
description: French-style chant for Liverpool's red kit ('the Reds').

title: We Are Liverpool, Tra La La
lyrics:
We are Liverpool, tra la la la la,
We are Liverpool, tra la la la la la la la.
description: Simple repetitive call chant used on the Kop and around the ground.

title: One Kiss
lyrics:
One kiss is all it takes,
Fallin' in love with me...
description: Dua Lipa song adopted by Liverpool fans during the 2018-19 title challenge.

title: Ring of Fire
lyrics:
Love is a burning thing,
And it makes a fiery ring...
description: Johnny Cash song adopted on the Kop, especially during big European nights.

title: Every Other Tuesday
lyrics:
Every other Tuesday, we work and we slouch,
The other day's for football, and going to the match...
description: Humorous Liverpool song about European away nights and matchday routine.

title: Pass and Move (It's the Liverpool Groove)
lyrics:
Pass and move, pass and move, pass and move, pass and move,
It's the Liverpool groove, ba da da da da...
description: 1990s terrace song celebrating Liverpool's passing style.

title: The Anfield Rap
lyrics: Anfield rap, we're the Liverpool crew...
description: 1980s novelty song by John Barnes and Craig Johnston; part of club folklore.

title: Justice for the 96
lyrics:
Justice for the 96,
Justice for the 96.
description: Remembrance chant for the 97 victims of the Hillsborough disaster (96 plus later inquest).

title: Istanbul 2005 Chant
lyrics:
Istanbul, Istanbul, we won it five times,
Istanbul, Istanbul, we won it five times...
description: Chant celebrating Liverpool's fifth European Cup, won in Istanbul in 2005.

title: We Won It Six Times
lyrics:
We won it six times, we won it six times,
Liverpool FC, we won it six times.
description: Chant celebrating Liverpool's sixth European Cup/Champions League title (2019).

title: Luis Garcia (Barcelona 2005)
lyrics:
His name is Luis Garcia, he plays for Liverpool,
He came from Barcelona to Liverpool,
He plays on the left, he plays on the right,
He makes the Kop sing every night.
description: Chant for Luis Garcia, especially remembered for the 'ghost goal' against Chelsea in 2005.

title: Corner Taken Quickly
lyrics: Corner taken quickly, ORIGI!
description: Chant immortalising Divock Origi's goal against Barcelona in the 2019 Champions League semi-final.

title: Origi Against Barcelona
lyrics:
Divock Origi, he scores the winning goal,
Divock Origi, he scores the winning goal...
description: Celebration song for Divock Origi's decisive goals in the 2019 Barcelona comeback.

title: Steve Gerrard Is His Name
lyrics:
His name is Steven Gerrard, he wears the number eight,
His name is Steven Gerrard, he plays for Liverpool great...
description: Terrace tribute to Steven Gerrard, Liverpool captain and club legend.

title: Steven Gerrard Leader of the Kop
lyrics:
Steven Gerrard, leader of the Kop,
Steven Gerrard, leader of the Kop...
description: Kop-end chant honouring Gerrard's leadership.

title: We All Dream of a Team of Carraghers
lyrics:
We all dream of a team of Carraghers,
A team of Carraghers, a team of Carraghers...
description: Jamie Carragher tribute sung to the tune of Just Can't Get Enough.

title: Jamie Carragher Is His Name
lyrics: His name is Jamie Carragher, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Direct terrace tribute to defender Jamie Carragher.

title: Robbie Fowler God
lyrics:
Worship to Fowler, God almighty Fowler,
You are the son of God, Robbie Fowler...
description: Kop chant for Robbie Fowler, one of Liverpool's greatest natural goalscorers.

title: Ian Rush Scored 346
lyrics:
Ian Rush scored 346,
Ian Rush scored 346...
description: Chant celebrating Ian Rush's Liverpool goal-scoring record.

title: King Kenny Dalglish
lyrics:
Kenny Dalglish, King Kenny Dalglish,
Kenny Dalglish, King Kenny Dalglish...
description: Chant for Kenny Dalglish as player and manager.

title: John Barnes
lyrics:
There's only one John Barnes, one John Barnes,
There's only one John Barnes...
description: Tribute to winger John Barnes, key figure in Liverpool's 1980s success.

title: Michael Owen
lyrics: Michael Owen, Michael Owen, running down the wing...
description: 1990s/2000s terrace song for striker Michael Owen.

title: Luis Suarez
lyrics:
He plays on the left, he plays on the right,
That boy Suarez makes Messi look shite...
description: 2010s chant for Luis Suarez during his prolific Liverpool spell.

title: Fernando Torres
lyrics:
His arse offends me, his arse offends me,
Fernando Torres, his arse offends me...
description: Playful terrace song from Fernando Torres's Liverpool era.

title: Dirk Kuyt
lyrics: Dirk Kuyt, Dirk Kuyt, running down the wing...
description: Chant for Dutch forward Dirk Kuyt, known for relentless work rate.

title: Peter Crouch
lyrics:
He's taller than you, he's taller than you,
Peter Crouch, he's taller than you...
description: Terrace song for striker Peter Crouch referencing his height.

title: Xabi Alonso
lyrics:
Xabi Alonso, he plays in midfield,
Xabi Alonso, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for Spanish midfielder Xabi Alonso.

title: Pepe Reina
lyrics: Pepe Reina, la la la la la la la la la la...
description: Goalkeeper chant for Pepe Reina during his Anfield years.

title: Si Senor (Firmino)
lyrics:
Si senor, give the ball to Bobby Firmino,
Si senor, give the ball to Bobby Firmino...
description: Brazilian-themed chant for Roberto Firmino.

title: Si Senor (Henderson)
lyrics: Si senor, pass the ball to Jordan Henderson...
description: Variant of Si Senor for captain Jordan Henderson.

title: Mo Salah (Egyptian King)
lyrics:
Mo Salah, la la la la la la,
If he's good enough for you, he's good enough for me,
If he scores another few, then I'll be Muslim too...
description: Iconic Mohamed Salah chant celebrating his goalscoring and global impact.

title: Running Down the Wing (Salah)
lyrics:
He's running down the wing, Salah la la la la la,
The Egyptian King, la la la la la...
description: Alternative Mohamed Salah terrace melody.

title: Sadio Mane
lyrics:
Sadio Mane, running down the wing,
Sadio Mane, running down the wing...
description: Chant for Senegalese forward Sadio Mane during the Klopp era.

title: Mane Mane Mane
lyrics: Mane, Mane, Mane, Mane, Mane, Mane, Mane...
description: Simple repetitive chant for Sadio Mane.

title: Virgil van Dijk
lyrics:
Oh Virgil van Dijk, oh Virgil van Dijk,
Virgil van Dijk, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for centre-back Virgil van Dijk.

title: Big Virg
lyrics: Big Virg, Big Virg, Big Virg...
description: Nickname chant for Virgil van Dijk.

title: Alisson Becker
lyrics:
Alisson Becker, the goalkeeper,
Alisson Becker, the best in the world...
description: Chant for Brazilian goalkeeper Alisson Becker.

title: Trent Alexander-Arnold
lyrics:
Trent Alexander-Arnold, he's our right-back,
Trent Alexander-Arnold, he's our right-back...
description: Homegrown right-back chant for Trent Alexander-Arnold.

title: Andy Robertson
lyrics:
Andy Robertson, he plays left-back,
Andy Robertson, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for Scottish left-back Andy Robertson.

title: Fabinho
lyrics: Fabinho, Fabinho, Fabinho...
description: Midfield destroyer chant for Fabinho.

title: Diogo Jota
lyrics:
Diogo Jota, he scores the goals,
Diogo Jota, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Tribute to Diogo Jota, tragically killed in 2024.

title: Luis Diaz
lyrics:
Luis Diaz, la la la la la,
Luis Diaz, la la la la la...
description: Chant for Colombian winger Luis Diaz.

title: Darwin Nunez
lyrics:
Darwin Nunez, he plays for Liverpool,
Darwin Nunez, he scores the goals...
description: Chant for Uruguayan striker Darwin Nunez.

title: Alexis Mac Allister
lyrics:
Alexis Mac Allister, he plays for Liverpool,
World Cup winner, Alexis Mac Allister...
description: Chant for Argentine midfielder Alexis Mac Allister.

title: Wataru Endo
lyrics:
Wataru Endo, he sits in midfield,
Wataru Endo, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for Japanese midfielder Wataru Endo.

title: Dominik Szoboszlai
lyrics:
Szoboszlai, la la la la la,
Dominik Szoboszlai...
description: Chant for Hungarian midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai.

title: Curtis Jones
lyrics:
Curtis Jones, he plays for the team,
He wears the number seventeen...
description: Homegrown midfielder chant for Curtis Jones.

title: Harvey Elliott
lyrics: Harvey Elliott, la la la la la...
description: Chant for academy graduate Harvey Elliott.

title: Cody Gakpo
lyrics: Cody Gakpo, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for Dutch forward Cody Gakpo.

title: Ibrahima Konate
lyrics: Ibrahima Konate, he plays at the back...
description: Chant for French centre-back Ibrahima Konate.

title: I'm So Glad Jurgen Klopp Is a Red
lyrics:
I'm so glad, Jurgen Klopp is a Red,
I'm so glad, he said fuck off to the Kop...
description: Celebratory chant for manager Jurgen Klopp during the successful era.

title: Jurgen Klopp La La La
lyrics:
Jurgen Klopp, la la la la la la la la,
Jurgen Klopp, la la la la la la la la...
description: Simple melody chant for Jurgen Klopp.

title: The Normal One
lyrics: I'm the normal one, I'm the normal one...
description: Reference to Klopp's famous 'I'm the normal one' introductory press conference.

title: Arne Slot Chant
lyrics:
Arne Slot, he leads the Reds,
Arne Slot, he leads the Reds...
description: Chant for manager Arne Slot, Jurgen Klopp's successor.

title: Bill Shankly Song
lyrics:
Shankly, Shankly, the name on every tongue,
Shankly, Shankly, he made the Kop sing...
description: Tribute to legendary manager Bill Shankly, architect of modern Liverpool.

title: Bob Paisley Song
lyrics:
Bob Paisley, he won it all,
Bob Paisley, he won it all...
description: Tribute to manager Bob Paisley, who won three European Cups.

title: Scouser Tommy (Shankly Gates)
lyrics: Outside the Shankly Gates, I heard a Kopite moan...
description: Variant of Poor Scouser Tommy referencing the Shankly Gates at Anfield.

title: Let's Talk About Six Baby
lyrics:
Let's talk about six, baby, let's talk about you and me,
Let's talk about all the good things and the bad things that may be...
description: Spice Girls parody celebrating Liverpool's sixth European Cup (2019).

title: Song 2 (Woo Hoo)
lyrics: Woo hoo, woo hoo...
description: Blur's Song 2 riff frequently sung on the Kop during exciting passages of play.

title: We Can See You Waving
lyrics:
We can see you waving, we can see you waving,
Your arms are going mad, your arms are going mad...
description: Away-end taunt sung by Liverpool fans to home supporters.

title: Who Are Ya
lyrics: Who are ya? Who are ya? Who are ya?
description: Generic terrace taunt used by Liverpool fans toward opposition.

title: Where Do You Come From
lyrics:
Where do you come from? Where do you come from?
Where do you come from, Liverpool?
description: Call-and-response chant about Liverpool origins and identity.

title: Red Men Chant
lyrics: We are the red men, mighty mighty red men...
description: Terrace identity chant for Liverpool's red kit.

title: Liverpool FC (Club Song)
lyrics:
Liverpool FC, Liverpool FC,
We are the greatest team in history...
description: General club pride chant.

title: Georginio Wijnaldum
lyrics: Georginio Wijnaldum, he scores the goals...
description: Chant for Dutch midfielder Georginio Wijnaldum, key in the 2019 Barcelona comeback.

title: James Milner
lyrics:
James Milner, he runs all day,
James Milner, he runs all day...
description: Chant celebrating James Milner's extraordinary fitness and versatility.

title: Naby Keita
lyrics: Naby Keita, he plays in midfield...
description: Chant for Guinean midfielder Naby Keita.

title: Joel Matip
lyrics: Joel Matip, he plays at the back...
description: Chant for Cameroonian centre-back Joel Matip.

title: Thiago Alcantara
lyrics: Thiago, Thiago, Thiago Alcantara...
description: Chant for Spanish midfielder Thiago Alcantara.

title: Takumi Minamino
lyrics: Minamino, Minamino, Minamino...
description: Chant for Japanese forward Takumi Minamino.

title: Kostas Tsimikas
lyrics: Kostas Tsimikas, he plays left-back...
description: Chant for Greek left-back Kostas Tsimikas.

title: Ryan Gravenberch
lyrics: Ryan Gravenberch, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for Dutch midfielder Ryan Gravenberch.

title: Conor Bradley
lyrics: Conor Bradley, he plays right-back...
description: Chant for Northern Irish academy graduate Conor Bradley.

title: Jarell Quansah
lyrics: Jarell Quansah, he plays at the back...
description: Chant for homegrown centre-back Jarell Quansah.

title: Emile Heskey
lyrics: Emile Heskey, he scores the goals...
description: Chant for striker Emile Heskey during his Liverpool years.

title: Steve McManaman
lyrics: McManaman, running down the wing...
description: Chant for winger Steve McManaman, local boy and academy product.

title: Dietmar Hamann
lyrics: Hamann, Hamann, Dietmar Hamann...
description: Chant for German midfielder Dietmar Hamann, Istanbul 2005 hero.

title: Jerzy Dudek
lyrics: Jerzy Dudek, he saved the day...
description: Tribute to goalkeeper Jerzy Dudek's penalty shootout heroics in Istanbul 2005.

title: Samuel Eto'o Mockery (2005 Final)
lyrics: Samuel Eto'o, he walks alone...
description: Taunting chant from the 2005 Champions League final context.

title: Steven Gerrard Istanbul
lyrics:
Steven Gerrard, he led the team,
In Istanbul, he fulfilled the dream...
description: Celebrating Gerrard's role in the 2005 Champions League final comeback.

title: Champions League Dream
lyrics: We're Liverpool FC, we're going to win the Champions League...
description: European campaign chant sung during knockout runs.

title: Goodison Park Taunt
lyrics: If you all hate Everton, clap your hands...
description: Rivalry chant sung toward Everton; part of Merseyside derby culture.

title: Poor Little Everton
lyrics: Poor little Everton, they haven't won a thing...
description: Merseyside derby taunt referencing Everton's trophy drought.

title: Manchester United Taunt
lyrics: You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore...
description: Generic taunt often directed at Manchester United at Anfield.

title: Chelsea Taunt (2005)
lyrics: Cheer up lads, you'll never walk alone...
description: Ironic taunt sung to Chelsea after Liverpool's 2005 semi-final victory.

title: Fields of Athenry (Away Version)
lyrics:
Low lie the fields of Anfield Road,
Where once we watched the great Bill Shankly...
description: Away-end variant of the Fields of Athenry melody with Liverpool lyrics.

title: Emre Can
lyrics: Emre Can, Emre Can, Emre Can...
description: Chant for German midfielder Emre Can during his Liverpool spell.

title: Adam Lallana
lyrics:
Adam Lallana, he plays for Liverpool,
Adam Lallana, he plays for Liverpool...
description: Chant for midfielder Adam Lallana in the Klopp era.
